docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZECENA, LUIS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY ZECENA, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT HUETE, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED MAR-18-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUETE, ALEX

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZECENA, LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUETE, ALEX $8,066.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,141.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LUIS ZECENA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT ALEX HUETE IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
